homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track features a fast, complex rhythm driven by pulsating beats and intricate syncopation. A powerful synthesizer creates an intense, futuristic soundscape punctuated by dramatic sound effects like explosions and glitches. The overall mood is dark and urgent, evoking a sense of chaos and unpredictability throughout the piece.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental rock track features a steady rhythm driven by an electric guitar, bass guitar, and drums with a distinct bluesy feel. The slow tempo and atmospheric tone create a moody atmosphere well-suited for a noir movie or video game soundtrack. Although related songs often appear more energetic, this specific segment maintains a calm, consistent groove throughout.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This song features an emotive male vocalist accompanied by acoustic and electric guitars, bass, and drums, creating a sound well-suited for movie soundtracks during moments of heartbreak. Its melancholic ballad style blends pop and rock elements to convey a deep sense of despair, making it fitting for dramatic scenes in a TV series. The combination of melodic instrumentation and expressive singing establishes a somber yet accessible tone throughout the track.

questions.caption: This instrumental track blends electronic and dance influences with a steady, rhythmic groove centered around synthesizers, a drum machine, and a driving bassline. The upbeat and energetic mood creates a sense of excitement that evokes a retro-futuristic atmosphere perfect for video games or club scenes.

questions.name: Sample 6
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: A dark and dramatic piece, this track builds a lush cinematic soundscape using synth strings and pads. A steady, driving rhythm propels the music forward while a haunting female voice and choir sample add emotional intensity. The overall atmosphere creates a perfect mood for an urgent movie soundtrack or intense scene.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track is an aggressive heavy metal piece driven by distorted electric guitar riffs and powerful drumming. The fast-paced, loud sound creates a high-energy atmosphere well-suited for live concerts or intense video game combat sequences. While the source material identifies the artist as a hardcore punk band from Croatia, this specific segment showcases a distinctly heavier musical style.

The music creates a dark and intense atmosphere with a hypnotic rhythm that maintains a sense of anticipation throughout the piece. Ultimately, its driving nature makes it an engaging choice for keeping an audience moving in a nightclub setting.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
